overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak walking through an autumn grassland toward ancient stone ruins under a dramatic apocalyptic red sky. The character passes a massive stone archway and a dark wooden wagon while approaching a distant castle with a burning Erdtree visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn grassland with ancient stone arch ruins

events.description: character walks past the large stone arch structure on the right side

agents.ego_description: character in white cloak walking steadily along the stone path toward the stone arch ruin

entered.detail: massive ancient stone archway structure with weathered blocks
cobblestone trail cutting through the tall grass
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
large stone castle structure visible in the misty distance
apocalyptic red sky with burning embers and cosmic clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open autumn grassland toward a massive stone arch ruin under a dramatic red burning sky. The stone path leads forward as the character approaches and passes the arch structure on the right, with distant castle ruins visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland field with wooden caravan wagon

events.description: character passes the dark wooden wagon with large wheels on the right

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the path, approaching and passing a wooden wagon with dead bodies nearby

entered.detail: dark wooden wagon with large spoked wheels and ornate carvings
fallen bodies lying in the grass near the wagon
tall thin stone tower rising behind the castle walls

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone arch, the character walks through open grassland toward a dark wooden caravan wagon. The character passes the wagon and the dead bodies scattered nearby, while the distant castle ruins and a tall stone tower become more prominent against the red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching castle ruins with burning sky

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily toward the castle ruins with the burning red Erdtree dominating the sky

entered.detail: ruined stone bridge with multiple arches connecting to the castle

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the character approaches the castle ruins as the wooden wagon falls behind. The tall stone tower and castle walls loom larger, silhouetted against the intensely burning red sky with floating embers. The stone path continues toward the massive structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an autumn grassland that gradually closes in on the looming silhouette of ancient castle ruins under a burning red sky. It begins with the character walking along a stone path toward a massive stone arch, passing the ruin on the right as distant structures emerge through the haze. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal a dark wooden caravan wagon and scattered bodies, while a tall stone tower becomes more prominent against the crimson horizon. The camera then continues its advance, leaving the wagon behind as the castle walls and tower loom larger and more imposing. Finally, the path leads directly toward the massive stone structure, which stands silhouetted against an intensely red sky filled with floating embers.
